//: Digital Asset Links file for the HOMU Ledger Android TWA.
//purpose: Tells Chrome on Android that app.ramu.homu.twa is owned by the same party that owns homu.ramu.app, so the TWA can launch URL bar-less.
//how-to-fill: 1. Build the Android TWA at least once (see scripts/native-android-bootstrap.md) so a release keystore exists.
2. From the bubblewrap project directory, run:
3. Copy the hex fingerprint (colon-separated, uppercase) into the `sha256_cert_fingerprints` array below — REPLACE every XX:XX:... line.
4. Redeploy (the file MUST be served from https://homu.ramu.app/.well-known/assetlinks.json with Content-Type: application/json).
